holdings.infoBox: QIDX is an equity ETF with a total of 134 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arista Networks stock at 3.60%, Alphabet at 3.40%, Cisco Systems at 2.83%, HEICO at 2.57%, and Thermo Fisher Scientific at 2.29%.

overview.description: The Indexperts Quality Earnings Focused ETF (QIDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks total return by broadly investing in US stocks of any market capitalization. QIDX was launched on Jan 2, 2025 and is issued by Indexperts.
